name: fd
description: Spec-driven feature delivery v2: takes a single feature from idea or documents, through a validated spec and self-contained tasks, to implemented code delivered as stacked PRs. Declarative core (spec → projection → code), hard binary quality gates with human-only waivers, Merkle content versioning with surgical invalidation, and wave-based implementation on isolated worktrees. Eight explicit commands (/fd:config, /fd:start, /fd:from-docs, /fd:grill, /fd:to-tasks, /fd:implement, /fd:to-prs, /fd:status) — no auto-chaining, the human drives progression.
